processed.title: The family physician : a manual of domestic medicine / by physicians and surgeons of the principal London hospitals.

New guide to health, or, Botanic family physician : containing a complete system of practice, upon a plan entirely new ; with a description of the vegetables made use of, and directions for preparing and administering them to cure disease ; to which is prefixed A narrative of the life and medical discoveries of the author / by Samuel Thomson.
